message:
feat(demo_showcase): complete wizard error handling and notifications

Enhance wizard page with full error simulation and notifications:

- Add Display impl for SimulatedError
- Add FailedGeneric variant for deployment status rendering
- Inject simulated errors at step 2 (provisioning resources)
- Reset retry count on successful deployment
- Emit success notification on deployment completion
- Use batch() for combining notification and completion commands

This completes the polished error handling flow where failures are
actionable (retry or back out) and successes are visibly celebrated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
